actions.description: Eleventh board meeting. All security findings resolved (P2 config/CORS by R&D, P3 frontend Docker by DevOps). 5 consecutive clean QA cycles. UX/UI design doc ready to build. Game #6 research still pending (third meeting flagging). Log rotation overdue at 52 files.
